title: ComfyUI active-model manifest
description: Validates the manifest YAML written by bootstrapper/utils/comfyui_resolver.py. Consumed by comfyui-init (download_models.sh: name, type, filename, download_url, sha256) and the backend GET /comfyui/db/models (full row as JSON). additionalProperties: false is intentional — any typo in field names must be caught before the downloader runs.

name.description: Stable unique identifier — matches the catalog name column.

type.description: Model category. Mapped from ComfyUILibraryEntry.category (category→type). Drives the in-container target directory.

filename.description: On-disk filename inside the target directory. Derived from ComfyUILibraryEntry.filename or the URL path. Used by download_models.sh to name the downloaded file and by ComfyUI's extension scanner to list it.

download_url.description: Direct download URL. Mapped from ComfyUILibraryEntry.url (url→download_url). Used by download_models.sh's curl/wget call.

sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 digest. Verified by download_models.sh when present and non-null.

file_size_gb.description: Approximate disk size in GB. Mapped from ComfyUILibraryEntry.size_gb (size_gb→file_size_gb). Surfaced in the backend GET response and used for disk-space warnings.

family.description: Display family label (e.g. 'SDXL', 'AnimateDiff'). Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.family.

target_dir.description: In-container subdirectory under /models where the file is placed. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.target_dir.

min_vram_gb.description: Minimum GPU VRAM in GB. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.min_vram_gb.

cpu_supported.description: Whether the model runs on CPU. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.cpu_supported.

requires_custom_node.description: ComfyUI custom-node repo names required to use this model. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.requires_custom_node.

popularity.description: Approximate popularity score. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.popularity.

source.description: Catalog origin: 'huggingface' | 'civitai' | 'curated' | 'fallback' | 'custom'. Passed through from ComfyUILibraryEntry.source.

active.description: Always true for manifest entries — every row in the manifest is an active model. Written as true by manifest_dict().

essential.description: Whether this is an essential model (activated even with empty COMFYUI_USER_MODELS). Always false in manifest rows — essential is a catalog attribute, not a manifest attribute. Written as false by manifest_dict().

description.description: Human-readable notes. Mapped from ComfyUILibraryEntry.notes (notes→description). Returned in the backend GET /comfyui/db/models JSON row.
